heading: Arbitration, compromise, or settlement
label: 31108 Arbitration, compromise, or settlement
text: The Attorney General may arbitrate, compromise, or settle a claim under this chapter if a civil action based on the claim has been commenced.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3110846 App.:786., .Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 428, § 643 Stat. 1113The words “claim under this chapter” are substituted for “claim on which a libel or cross libel would lie under the provisions of this chapter” to eliminate unnecessary words.
